display.purpose: Hero headline only — 'ProteinDB 🇮🇳' at page top.

headline.purpose: Product names, section headers, filter panel title.

label.purpose: Form labels, filter names, metadata keys.

caption.purpose: Tiny metadata — 'Lab Verified', 'In Stock', timestamps. Uppercase.

shadows.name: ambient-hover
shadows.purpose: Soft lift under product cards on hover.

shadows.name: sticky-panel
shadows.purpose: Shadow beneath the sticky filter control panel.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Load More button. Solid, trustworthy, subtle hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1e293b; color: #e2e8f0; padding: 12px 24px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid #334155; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.1); color: #818cf8; border-color: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Main product listing card. Semi-transparent with hover lift.
components.html:
MuscleBlaze

Biozyme Performance Whey

₹4.74/g
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.4); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); border: 1px solid #1e293b; border-radius: 24px; padding: 20px 24px; color: #f8fafc; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 0.3s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); border-color: rgba(51, 65, 85, 0.8); } .ds-card-header { margin-bottom: 16px; padding-bottom: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.8); } .ds-brand { font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #818cf8; } .ds-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.3; color: #f8fafc; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-badge { background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.1); border: 2px solid rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2); color: #a5b4fc; font-weight: 900; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 16px; font-size: 1rem; }

components.name: Indigo Badge
components.description: Accent badge for cost-per-gram and active filters.
components.css: .ds-badge-indigo { display: inline-block; background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2); color: #a5b4fc; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 6px; }

components.name: Success Badge
components.css: .ds-badge-success { display: inline-block; background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.2); color: #34d399; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 6px; }

components.name: Range Slider
components.description: Budget filter slider. Indigo accent on dark track.
components.css: .ds-slider { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 100%; height: 8px; background: #1e293b; border-radius: 8px; outline: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 20px; height: 20px; background: #6366f1; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid #818cf8; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb:hover { background: #818cf8; transform: scale(1.1); } .ds-slider::-moz-range-thumb { width: 20px; height: 20px; background: #6366f1; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid #818cf8; }

components.name: Sticky Control Panel
components.description: Filter panel that sticks to top on scroll. Glassmorphism for separation.
components.css: .ds-panel { position: sticky; top: 16px; z-index: 10; background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.6); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border: 1px solid #1e293b; border-radius: 24px; padding: 20px 24px; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .ds-panel:hover { box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); } .ds-panel-content { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; } @media (min-width: 768px) { .ds-panel-content { flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } }

components.name: Data Metric Tile
components.description: Individual stat tile inside product cards. Clean label + bold value.
components.css: .ds-tile { background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5); border: 1px solid rgba(51, 65, 85, 0.5); border-radius: 16px; padding: 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-tile-label { font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #64748b; } .ds-tile-value { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 900; color: #f8fafc; } .ds-tile-value-na { color: #f59e0b; font-size: 0.875rem; }

narrative.overview: ProteinDB is a clean, clinical workspace where data speaks for itself. Like a premium laboratory dashboard — precise, trustworthy, unembellished. Every number is clearly labeled, every comparison is honest. The dark slate foundation creates a focused, premium environment that feels like a professional tool rather than a consumer marketplace.
keyCharacteristics: Data-first hierarchy: cost-per-gram is the primary signal
Mobile-first pragmatism: most users browse on phones
Restrained confidence: premium feel without pretension
Trust through transparency: lab badges, stock status, price freshness

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary indigo accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: No pure #000 or #fff anywhere. Every neutral is tinted toward the indigo hue at low chroma.

rules.name: The Flat Scale Rule
rules.body: Typography hierarchy is built through weight contrast (≥1.25 ratio between steps) and size, not color.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus).

rules.name: The Functional Blur Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur is used only for the sticky control panel and only because it needs to visually separate from scrolling content beneath it.

dos: Do use tonal layering (opacity variations of slate) to create depth before reaching for shadows.
Do reserve indigo for the most important data point on any screen — cost per gram.
Do use generous border-radius (24px for cards, 12px for buttons) to soften the data density.
Do present lab verification with emerald green — it's the color of trust in this system.
Do use uppercase + wide tracking for micro-labels. It makes metadata scannable.
Do ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratios for all body text against the slate-950 background.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Decorative, never meaningful.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default. Blurs and glass cards used decoratively are forbidden.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as a colored accent). Never intentional.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent). SaaS cliché.
Don't create identical card grids. Same-sized cards with icon + heading + text, repeated endlessly.
Don't use modals as a first thought. Modals are usually laziness.
Don't add 'BUY NOW' buttons, urgency timers, or stock scarcity badges.
Don't use red/black aggressive gym aesthetics. No 'GET SHREDDED', no macho imagery.
